root.name: Slide 11 Text Placeholder Replacement
root.description: Evaluates whether, on slide 11, the placeholder text 'Click to add text' was replaced correctly with the specified target text, with no extraneous modifications to other slides or content.

children.name: Correct replacement of placeholder text on slide 11
children.description: Checks that the text 'Click to add text' was replaced with the exact target text on slide 11.

children.name: No extraneous changes to other slides
children.description: Checks that no slides other than slide 11 had nontrivial modifications (excluding minor metadata changes).

children.name: No extraneous added/removed/modified elements on slide 11
children.description: Checks that, besides the replacement of the text placeholder, no other elements (shapes, images, etc.) were added, removed, or significantly altered on slide 11.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # Only a single text shape should be replaced
    # We inspect modified elements count and types
    # We'll allow for one modified element: the original placeholder text shape to the new text shape
    mods = [pair for pair in ppt_diff.modified_slides if pair[0].slide_number == 11]
    added = [slide for slide in ppt_diff.added_slides if slide.slide_number == 11]
    removed = [slide for slide in ppt_diff.removed_slides if slide.slide_number == 11]
    extraneous = False
    # Check for additions/removals on slide 11 itself
    if added or removed:
        extraneous = True
    # If more than one shape modified, suspect extraneous modification
    for (old, new) in mods:
        if abs(old.element_count - new.element_count) > 0:
            extraneous = True
    if extraneous:
        return "Extraneous elements added/removed/modified on slide 11.", 0.0
    return "No extraneous elements changed on slide 11; only placeholder replaced.", 1.0

metadata.task: On slide 11, Replace the "Click to add text" placeholder with "Left rudder causes left yaw, right rudder causes right yaw"
